parameters.content:
## 🚢 Customs Documentation Validator

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for shipping docs
2. Extracts invoice, packing list, and BOL data
3. Cross-validates values, quantities, and weights
4. Flags discrepancies that could cause delays
5. Checks HS codes for consistency
6. Logs validation results to Google Sheets
7. Sends Slack alert for any mismatches

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for customs documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Shipment ID | Document Type | Invoice Total | Packing List Total | BOL Weight | Discrepancies | HS Code Issues | Status | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Customs brokers
- Import/export managers
- 3PL providers

parameters.prompt: Extract customs document data as flat fields only — no nested objects or arrays. Identify documentType (commercial invoice/packing list/bill of lading/airway bill/certificate of origin/customs declaration/other). Extract: documentNumber, documentDate, shipmentId. Shipper: shipperName, shipperAddress, shipperCountry. Consignee: consigneeName, consigneeAddress, consigneeCountry. Route: originCountry, destinationCountry, portOfLoading, portOfDischarge, carrier, vesselOrFlight. Cargo: declaredValue (number), currency, declaredWeight (number), weightUnit, packageCount (number), packageType, hsCodes (comma-separated HS codes), goodsDescription, lineItemsSummary (plain text summary of items), lineItemsCount (number), calculatedValue (sum of all line item values as number). References: containerNumbers (comma-separated), sealNumbers (comma-separated), poReference, paymentTerms, incoterms. Compliance: countryOfOrigin, hazmatPresent (true/false), insuranceValue (number).
